ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: The plugin will use this file to store its data which needs to survive a restart of Obsidian.
ast.target: 插件将使用此文件来存储其需要在 Obsidian 重启后保留的数据。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: A time-delay to avoid scrolling when opening a file through a link which already scrolls to a specific position. If you are not using links to page sections, set the delay to zero (slider to the left). Slider values: 0-300 ms (default value: 200 ms).
ast.target: 通过链接打开文件时，为避免滚动而设置的时间延迟，该链接通常会滚动到特定位置。如果您不使用指向页面章节的链接，请将延迟设置为零（将滑块移至最左侧）。滑块值范围：0-300毫秒（默认值：200毫秒）。

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Delay after opening a new note in milliseconds
ast.target: 打开新笔记后的延迟（毫秒）

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Delay between saving the current cursor position
ast.target: 保存当前光标位置之间的延迟

ast.name: name
ast.target: 前进到下一个光标位置

ast.name: text
ast.source: This plugin has two functionalities - both related to the position of the cursor within the editor.
ast.target: 此插件具有两项功能——均与编辑器内光标的位置相关。

ast.name: text
ast.source: It keeps a history of the last few hundred cursor positions (across files), allowing you to move backward and forward using shortcuts.
ast.target: 它会保存最近几百个光标位置的历史记录（跨文件），允许您使用快捷键在历史记录中前进和后退。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Shortcut 1: "Return to previous cursor position" goes backward in the history.
ast.target: 快捷键1：“返回上一个光标位置”在历史记录中后退。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Shortcut 2: "Re-return to next cursor position" goes forward in the history.
ast.target: 快捷键2：“前进到下一个光标位置”在历史记录中前进。
